name: moai-pi-overlay
description: Project-local pi overlay for running the Claude-oriented MoAI harness with semantic parity.

scripts.check: for f in extensions/moai-claude-compat/index.ts extensions/moai-claude-compat/src/*.ts; do node --experimental-strip-types --check "$f" || exit 1; done; node --experimental-strip-types --check packages/pi-provider-kimi-code/index.ts || exit 1; node --experimental-strip-types extensions/moai-claude-compat/statusline-footer.test.mjs; node --experimental-strip-types extensions/moai-claude-compat/kimi-quota.test.mjs; node --experimental-strip-types packages/pi-provider-kimi-code/kimi-diagnostics.test.mjs; node extensions/moai-claude-compat/package-defaults.test.mjs; node --experimental-strip-types extensions/moai-claude-compat/agent-dispatch.test.mjs; node extensions/moai-claude-compat/patch-ask-user-question-envelope.mjs; node extensions/moai-claude-compat/ask-user-question-envelope.test.mjs; node --experimental-strip-types extensions/moai-claude-compat/team-profile-mapping.test.mjs; node --experimental-strip-types extensions/moai-claude-compat/ai-attribution.test.mjs; node --experimental-strip-types extensions/moai-claude-compat/git-attribution.test.mjs
